name: Pipedrive MCP Server
what_it_does: Pipedrive MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Pipedrive's sales CRM — managing contacts, organizations, deals, and activities; querying sales pipeline stages; automating deal progression; and integrating Pipedrive sales data into agent-driven sales automation workflows.
use_cases: Creating and updating deals and contacts from sales automation agents
Querying pipeline stages and deal velocity from sales analytics agents
Logging activities and notes from sales outreach agents
Moving deals through pipeline stages from progression automation agents
Generating sales forecasts from reporting agents
Syncing Pipedrive data with marketing tools from integration agents
not_for: Teams using HubSpot, Salesforce, or Zoho CRM as primary system
Enterprise CRM needs requiring Salesforce's customization depth
Non-sales use cases (Pipedrive is sales-pipeline focused)
best_when: An agent needs to automate Pipedrive sales pipeline activities — deal management, contact updates, or pipeline reporting for sales teams.
avoid_when: You're using HubSpot, Salesforce, or another CRM — or if you need deep marketing automation capabilities.

auth.notes: Pipedrive API token (personal, full access) or OAuth 2.0 with scopes. OAuth preferred for production — token is user-specific and inherits user's permissions.

pricing.notes: No free tier — trial only. API access included across all plans. Pipedrive focuses on sales pipeline simplicity. MCP server is community open source.

performance.rate_limits: 80 req/2s per API token; burst allowed

known_agent_gotchas: API token is user-specific — use a dedicated service user token for agents
Rate limit is 80 req/2s per token — shared across all agent calls
Custom fields in Pipedrive have hash IDs (e.g., abc123) — must discover schema first
Pipeline and stage IDs vary per account — agents must query available pipelines
Community MCP server — feature coverage may not include all API endpoints
Webhooks required for real-time updates — polling is not recommended
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token (user-level) or OAuth 2.0 scoped tokens. SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR. Community MCP server — review before production. Use dedicated service user for API token.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. User API token or OAuth 2.0. SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR. Community MCP server. Use dedicated service user for agent tokens.
